name: Polymath
long_description:
Polymath is an applied research lab focused on increasing the reliability and autonomy of AI agents, in order to better serve people. We believe that the key to getting models to perform reliably across long horizons is the quality, complexity, and abundance of RL environments. 

We build long-horizon, multi-tool environments for training AI agents to perform useful work autonomously in the real world. We believe that RL environments will be an advanced software product, not a human labor problem.

We're a team of researchers and engineers from UC Berkeley, Hume AI, Plaid, and Amazon. We have years of experience post-training frontier models in industry, and building large scale data systems. Polymath is backed by Y Combinator.
